'''Ti-Amun Tiro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a member of the [[Almas Academy]], a board of Masters and [[Jedi instructor|instructors]] who oversaw operations of the [[Almas Academy|Order's academy]] on [[Almas]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Ti-Amun Tiro was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. A noted [[Below the Belt: Philosophy|philosopher]], Tiro was appointed as an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the [[Almas Academy|experimental academy]] on [[Almas]], a planet located in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].<ref name="CAM" />

By the time the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], a violent conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Tiro had been appointed to the [[Almas Council]], the academy's governing body which served as a satellite to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When Headmaster [[Lanius Qel-Bertuk]] called a meeting of the Council, the Coruscant envoy, Master [[Darrus Jeht/Legends|Darrus Jeht]], announced that the High Council was recalling most of the Academy's instructors to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] where they would be assigned ranks in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and lead [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. Furious by the High Council's decision, Tiro stormed out of the chamber in protest.<ref name="CAM" />
